description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic pose as if suspended or hanging from two taut lines or straps above. The figure is dressed in casual attire, including a long-sleeve top and pants, with visible footwear. The posture suggests the person is gripping or being supported by the straps, with legs slightly bent and one foot extended downward. The head is covered, possibly by a cap or helmet, and the facial features are not clearly visible. The overall form is elongated due to the stretched arms and the lines extending above, giving the impression of an urban activity such as slacklining or aerial exercise.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual clothing is suspended by two straps, arms raised and legs bent, as if engaged in an urban aerial activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person gripping two straps above, with the head and torso clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended arms and the way the straps support the body, with one leg and foot more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the alignment of the body along the straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear profile of the face, arm, and the extended leg and foot.
attribute_posture: hanging with arms raised and legs bent
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a cap
